title: forsskaolea angustifolia
intro: Forsskaolea angustifolia, also known as the New Zealand fern tree or New Zealand holly fern, is a plant species native to New Zealand and southern Australia. It has been traditionally used in herbal medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties. The plant has been found to have various health benefits, including reducing fever, alleviating respiratory issues, and supporting immune function. The leaves and roots of Forsskaolea angustifolia are used in herbal preparations, such as teas, infusions, and tinctures, to leverage its medicinal properties.
